description: Leads Otter turns job postings into B2B sales leads by monitoring hiring activity from over 60 countries and 100,000 job boards, updated every 8 to 12 hours.
tagline: B2B lead generation from hiring data
overview: Leads Otter converts job posting activity into sales leads by monitoring hiring signals from more than 60 countries and 100,000 job boards, with data refreshed every 8 to 12 hours. The tool surfaces companies that are growing, backfilling roles, or expanding geographically, giving sales teams a way to reach active buyers before competitors do.
what_is: Leads Otter is a B2B sales prospecting tool that converts job postings into qualified leads by treating hiring activity as a reliable indicator of buying potential. It fits within lead generation and sales prospecting workflows, monitoring data from more than 60 countries and over 100,000 job boards with updates every 8 to 12 hours. Because companies that are actively hiring are often simultaneously evaluating new vendors and tools, this real-time hiring data allows sales teams to reach prospects at a moment when they are more likely to be receptive.

The platform excels at identifying companies that are growing headcount, replacing key roles, or expanding into new regions. Leads become actionable as soon as hiring signals are detected, enabling timely outreach before the opportunity cools or competitors move in. Contacts and signals can be exported to a CRM or other sales systems via CSV, with webhook delivery available as an upcoming capability.

Leads Otter is designed to complement existing sales data sources by adding a hiring-driven signal layer, not to replace a full CRM or contact database. It does not cover general marketing automation; its role is specific to surfacing hiring-driven sales opportunities. Teams looking to add a fresh, frequently updated source of relevant leads will find it a focused and easy-to-adopt addition to their prospecting workflow.
